Affiliation: Bayview Marauders ☠️

(Southside) Bayview Harbor, New York

(Universe)

(Feel free to explore Bayview Harbor with its landmarks and notable locations!)

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

ғᴀᴄᴛɪᴏɴs:

• The Bayview Marauders: a notorious outlaw motorcycle club. Established in the late 1990s, the Marauders have built a reputation as one of the most feared and elusive clubs in the region. Their signature colors are black and silver, with a distinctive knife emblem featuring red roses. The Marauders are heavily involved in drug trafficking, extortion, illegal gambling, arms trafficking, murder, and robbery. The club's leadership consists of the President, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer, and Sergeant-at-Arms, each responsible for different aspects of the club’s operations.

• Harbor City Boys: An unorganized street gang, known for their ruthless tactics and control over illegal gambling and extortion in the southside of Bayview Harbor. They often operate out of abandoned warehouses and dilapidated docks along the waterfront.

• Bayview Syndicate: A well-organized gang with a strong presence in narcotics trafficking and smuggling. They are known for their connections with corrupt officials and their ability to evade law enforcement in the more residential areas of southside Bayview Harbor.

Feel free to roleplay however/which way you want
